Central, Friendly, off the main road.

Where do I start such a great caravan park located close to the heart of tweed heads nestled just off Terranora creek.

Firstly was welcomed with a fully secured entry point if you were concerned about safety and the staff was very welcoming.

We stayed on an ensuite site very level and well looked and modern ensuite once setup you very quickly notice how close you are to the lagoon and U even have an option to be setup right next to it able to fish from your bed.

Facilities where second to none with a well designed kitchen with everything you need to cook up a storm or just simply wash your dishes with detergent and wash cloths provided. After you have cooked enjoy your meal overlooking the lagoon.

Now if you are worried the kids will be bored than fear not as your kids will have endless water slides to entertain themselves as well as a green area with basketball soccer nets a large un heated pool and another heated pool. I did find the pool was a little warm for my liking so I just alternated between the cold and the warm pool.

We also opted for a kayak and stand up paddle boarding which was very cheap $10 pp for an hour and trust me that's all you needed.

Personal cons about the park :

A bit loud at night with aeroplanes passing over head due to being so close to Coolangatta airport and also can hear traffic as the highway seems to be next door other than that loved our stay Would definitely recommend this park.

Well up there in our top 10 parks 🏞️

Stayed in one of the newer cabins; very nice and comfortable as far as cabins go. The billabong made for excellent paddle boarding and the kids loved all the pools and activities. The cafe was staffed by lovely people and had really good coffee and food. We will definitely stay there or in another big 4 again.

Great caravan park. One of the best I've stayed at. Waterpark is excellent. The staff were fantastic. Communication prior to booking was great. Facilities were top notch - jumping pillow, pools, playgrounds (one for under 6 yo and one for older kids), amazing camp kitchen and lounge area, billabong was beautiful - with kayaking & SUP. Sites were perfect and amenities were great - including the family bathrooms. Location is great - not too far if you want to drive to the Gold Coast. Couldn't fault them for anything 😊

The absolute best park and holiday we have ever had! We have 3 children and they cried there little eyes out leaving. This park is worth absolutely every cent and there is so much family friendly to do! Couldn’t recommend it more!!! Cannot wait to go back.
Is it security? Can you get out the gate if you haven’t got a key?    Can I go for a walk around on my gonna get trapped? My uncle went there

Awesome friendly park and staff with lots to do for the kids.
the billabong is crawling with sea creatures (hard to catch though) Toilets where well looked after and even have fans and music in them.
Only down side is the highway noise and the planes taking off but after 3 days we got used to them.
loved our stay otherwise. Cheers guys

We had caravan and car breakdown near Billabong recently and van was towed to the park. The service and the assistance from every staff member we dealt with was amazing. We left for home twice during our stay and they had us back and treated us the same. The park was full as school holidays but still accomodated us. . The park is lovely and so much for families to do. Amenities clean. We had no car but the staff moved us from site to site. I cannot thank every body there enough for their help when we were in trouble. Eileen and Stephen Wallis
Beautiful park, traffic noise is around and under flight path but that was OK during the day and I used ear plugs at night. It didn't bother hubby.

Such a beautiful park. The amenities are incredible, the camp kitchen and shared  family space just amazing!
The facilities, pool and lake with access to free paddle boards and kayaks  is great fir all.  The location to Coolangatta, GC and surrounding areas is second to none.
We will be back and can't wait

Amazing. We had such a beautiful long weekend here, relaxing around the Billabong, kayaking, swimming and having fun in the water slides area, enjoyed delicious pizza from the food trucks on the Saturday night. Staff are so lovely, each and every one of them, helpful, kind and knowledgeable. Cant rate this place high enough. Will definitely be back again and again!
Awesome place to stay and look forward to going back

Overall had a good 4 nights on a powered site, cleanliness of toilets and showers could improve, water slides are great for kids, only thing that was annoying is we were having a bbq in slide area and people that live there were going through bins getting recycling out and tipping it out right next to where we were eating.  If you want to sleep in forget about that as 6am on the dot jets are taking off and landing till late at  night that didn’t bother us but just giving heads up, overall it was ok 3 star in my opinion, not as clean as the other big fours 👍

A very beautifully maintained park, great location, very nice friendly staff. We have thoroughly enjoyed our stay in the 3 bedroom cabin. Not far from the waterpark for the kids, heated pool, kids club, coffee on site aswell as pod machine in cabin. Very happy with our stay and sad to be checking out tomorrow. Thank you Tweed Billabong!

Absolutely loved our weekend away. Staff are friendly and helpful, kids loved everything there, waterslides, pool, SUP in the lagoon, pedal carts and coffee van. Great location so we could venture out. Our cabin was amazing, a family of 5 in a beautiful 3 bedroom villa, wish we could stay longer. We will definitely come back.

Great facilities, love the camp kitchen and lounge area.  Great place for families.  The van site was great, close to amenities. Staff are very helpful.  Loads of things to do, kayak, SUP, gokarts, watermark, basketball,  chess, table tennis, bocce, putt putt. Something for everyone!

We just had the most positive experience at this resort! Our flights were cancelled and we were struggling to find last minute accommodation, but then we came across big 4 tweed heads billabong. Our kids were delighted with the water slides and movie nights at the billabong and heated pools and jumping pillow and the staff were extremely accomodating and welcoming. When we were down, they lifted us up. Thank you so much for a lovely stay.

Such a relaxing place to stay.
We had a wonderful time there. Breakfast every morning right next to the billabong, awesome play areas for the kids & a heated pool for the colder days & only a 5 minute drive to the shopping centre.

loved our stay at the big 4 and found it perfect for family’s .
plenty to do without even leaving the park

Spent 7 Nights here with 2 kids and they never had a dull moment, Heated Pool for the win! Splash park was also a big hit in July as back home it’s below 10 degrees.
Perfect location for us to come and go, secure and Clean! Thanks Big 4 Tweed, we will be back

Our first family getaway in a while but first camp/cabin style family vacation. The staff were amazing and friendly. Our children had a wonderful time even though it rained majority of our trip.
Our boys had an amazing time in the pools & water park - no rain could stop our water babies. Hopefully we will be back this summer to do a lot more activities in the sun! Thank you for having us and the fantastic service provided.

There is so much for the family to do here and will sure keep the kids entertained. Pools, Slides, playgrounds, fishing, lagoos, peddle bike hire, paddleboards. The cabarita cabins were rather cozy but the mattresses were a little hard. Overall a great stay and would go back again (hopefully when the weather is better!)
It has good facilities, the kids loved it only downfall is the airport being so close the planes are loud going past of a night time but everything else was great!

5 stars! Had the best 3 night stay. We loved it here. Great family facilities, cabins spacious and clean have everything you needed. Service from desk staff was outstanding, helpful, welcoming, assisted us with no issues, friendly, beyond expectation. Couldn't fault a thing. Will definitely be back!
Thank you !
Great place for kids, plenty of activities to keep them busy for 12 hours straight. Large cabins, I would recommend Tweed Heads Billabong to all families.
Amazzingggg! Will definitely be back!

Central location to all activities. Easily accessed. Very clean and tidy, best camp kitchen we have seen with the bonus of a morning barista. A lovely cafe walking distance overlooking the Tweed River. Oh and don't miss Husk Distillery.
Children have a number of huge playgrounds, pool, bounce thingy and a water park.
Loved our stay. Friendly, helpful staff. Clean cabin and facilities. Amazing place for children, waterpark, pools, treehouse playground, go karts, mini golf. Will stay again.
This place was probably one of the best parks we've stayed at.
Always love bringing the kids here for a quick weekend getaway. That love it

We took our caravan here for a last minute booking. Perfect for the kids. Little bit of fishing in the billabong, pools and waterslides. Road noise from the highway is a little getting use too. And the airport isn't far away either. Other than that pretty nice place to stay.
Kids love it
Reception staff were friendly and efficient. All amenities were clean and well maintained. Best of all we had a great time.

We love the natural Billabong, so many different types of sea life in there. Such a well maintained park with heaps of activities. Professional friendly staff, we stay in a cabin and it's so comfortable, we never want to stay anywhere else.

Stayed may 2024. Went to reception  my husband was handed a mother's day gift for me, in conversation  it came up he was there for his birthday and was handed a bottle of wine . Lovely geatures. Nice clean park. Our ensuites site was  near the billabong, so calming view. We started to set up and a low flying jet comes in to land at the airport. Well that was a surprise, very noisy.
The planes continue every half hour or so and into the night and start again early morning.  Grandson was fishing in billabong and had some older children come speak to him, he turns around and his phone was gone. They then proceeded to say looking for this and threw it in the billabong. He tried to pursue them but being on bike they took off.one very upset boy. He was absolutely  gutted that someone did that to him . Management wanted no part in it. Wouldn't help in anyway.  After talking with a permanent in the park who helped our grandson, these types of things happen regularly, and mostly at night. They help themselves to what ever in people's camps. So lock away any thing lime alcohol and personal belongings. Our opinion lovely place but needs some attention to a few issues.

We took the family, kids and grandkids to Tweed Billabong over the May day weekend. Cannot fault the place. Large sites, we had 3 for our van and the kids tents which gave us plenty of room. Staff were some of the friendliest we have encountered, always smiling and nothing was too much trouble. All facilities were super clean. The whole family loved the place. From the time we checked in on the Friday till checkout Monday we did not leave. Highly recommend plenty to do and not crowded.

Absolutely incredible all round, staff are beyond amazing (irreplaceable they are)was made feel so welcome right from check in to every time we had to ask them questions or hire things or for directions! Facilities are super clean and fresh! Water park is a day spender with go- cart hire and sup board hire you don’t need to leave! Best place to stay! Will definitely be comming back! Thank you Tweed Billabong holiday park for and unforgettable holiday!

Sehr freundlich und entgegenkommend! Als Deutsche fühlten wir uns angenommen und auf Augenhöhe akzeptiert! Wir waren zufrieden!

Very friendly and accommodating! As Germans, we felt accepted and accepted as equals! We were satisfied!

Tweed Billabong was a great place to take my family during the Easter weekend. Great spot for fishing, generous size pools, convenient kitchen space w theatre room. Food trucks onsite if you’ve had enough snags on the barbecue 🤣 Overall, we recommend this place. Only thing I do recommend is ear plugs if you’re a light sleeper and your site is right by the motorway.
Der Standort ist leider nicht gut: lärmig (M1 und Fluglärm) und etwas abgelegen. Die teure Ensuite Powered Site ist sehr nahe am M1. Ansonsten bietet der Park gute Annehmlichkeiten.

Was our first time camping as a family and couldn’t of picked a better camp ground the staff were friendly and very helpful all the facilities were kept clean there were so many   activities for the kids each day they loved everything but their favourites were the waterpark and kayaking
Great place for a family holiday...you don't have to leave the park..close to shops.

The facilities at this park are incredible - we go to Big4s all over the country and were very happy with the pool billabong and splashpark. Staff were super friendly. Unfortunately room was not cleaned properly which I mentioned and had zero response. There isn't much around this location either. There is one stunning cafe but not much locally to do. We spent our trips up at plam beach, currumbin, tallebugera, burleigh which has more to do. WHilst thats on 15mins there wasn't enough for us close by to walk to. The planes are really really noisy so is the freeway. And whilst you can't hear it in the cabin that much it does wake you up daily at 7am.
Great place! Very clean and staff are awesome
Best ever kids loved

Extremely overpriced, best to avoid, plenty of options around that are cheaper. These people are really taking the P is with their prices. If everyone stays away they will have to be more reasonable with pricing.
Not pet friendly, so couldn't stay. Most of the parks in the Tweed Region aren't pet friendly

Really enjoyed our stay here !
Perfect for the kids . Wasn’t overly packed .
Camp sites are decent size & all the amenities you need . We have already planned on a trip back here ☺️ Pool slides & the man made lake were the best!

We bought our own food with us but did notice not a lot of food option's if we hadn’t bring food.

* Beware of thieves we had an elderly man in his 60s-70s attempt to steal  money out of our wallets whilst we were in the swimming pools (we caught him luckily). Funny enough there were no cameras pointing in the direction so I assume he knows where the cameras are , we think he possibly lives on the site cabins ? Very scary. *
Great caravan park. We are in one of their lovely cabins. Terrific

We had an ensuite site which meant we had exclusive use of our own loo, shower which was clean & nicely tiled. Very accessible user-friendly site with a synthetic grass turf ground to step-out from your tent/camper-van or in our case, caravan. The weekend we stayed was rainy but the pool remained opened and the hosts sent daily txt of all activities that were on for the day, especially helpful if you have young children. It has a modern large communal kitchen and laundry. We would definitely stay again. Also wifi good speed.
Great view of the billabong and great service
Close to the  Gold Coast QLD in Tweed NSW. Fishing camping good times.
Mossies are bad and pool grounds could do with a good gerni

New management Amazing!! We love this  park  been going past 9 years found this trip so much better  camp kitchen ovens, fridge bathrooms so clean  but also the friendly staff at reception were so lovely and accommodated all requests 🥰 can’t wait to book in again soon.

Don’t second guess yourself. Just book it. The kids will love you for it and  you’ll have a well earned break. Lots to do. Didn’t need to leave the place and certainly didn’t need to spend money on theme parks. Take bikes. Staff are excellent. My kids loved Lisa, and Kieran was a God send 😀
Sauber und hat alles, was man braucht. Die zu Weihnachten geschenkte Wein-Flasche bei Ankunft verdient eigentlich einen Bonus-Punkt.

Great customer focused staff. Cannot fault them at all.

Park was great, kids loved every minute of the water slides, pools, gokarts and lagoon.

Highly recommended for your next family holiday.

Our Family came over from New Zealand for a holiday so we decided to book with you guys for a few nights. The ladies at reception were so lovely even upgrading us to 2 x duranbah cabins pretty much next to each other. We had an awesome time and the kids absolutely loved the mini water park and pool. And with the planes flying over u hardly take any notice of it. Will definitely book another holiday there again.

This was a fabulous, low-key destination for our family reunion holiday.  Great activities on offer for kids of all ages.  The pool area and waterpark make for easy supervision of children, with ample shaded seating areas for adults to sit and relax in.

The Brunch on Billabong coffee cart offers a top morning coffee fix, and the stylish camp kitchen / lounge facilities are beyond compare.

The lagoon was a highlight for the older kids, filling their days with fishing, kayaking and stingray spotting.

Our cabins were very tidy and comfortable. Some family members stayed in Burleigh cabins, while others opted for the larger, more spacious Duranbah cabins. Both styles were fit-for-purpose, catering to the needs of our large group.

Thanks for an amazing and stress-free family experience.

Highly recommended!

Best place to stay and relax with kids. So many different activities and great range for all ages including teens. Highly recommend if you want to stay somewhere where your can just chill out and not have to leave the park to entertain the kids if you don't want to. Also has on site coffee place!!!!
great place to stay, great facilities and staff really friendly

We stayed for 3 nights on a powered site. Site was a standard size for a caravan park. Amenities were always clean. Has an awesome waterpark for the big and small kids, as well as 2 pools. Loved the small football/basketball/games area. Staff were very friendly. We had an amazing time and will definitely be back again.
Billabong was a pleasant surprise and we will definitely stay again.

Such an amazing place for kids of all ages. Stayed with a group in caravans, sites are spacious and well shaded. Amenities are modern and clean. We’ve been to a few Big4’s and have found they are so strict on things it’s almost a turn off, the complete opposite here, staff were all so chill, helpful and accommodating. Absolutely loved it.
Ensuite site close to Billabong, notowels or toiletries but very clean. Heaps of activities for families and large shopping centre  nearby. Camp kitchen enormous withTV and cooking facilities.

Such a great relaxing caravan park. The kids absolutely love the place and the cabins are very nice but this review is for the staff and their helpfulness. They went above  and beyond to help us during our stay. Thank you to a wonderful friendly team
Super friendly staff, lots of things to do, especially for kids. Wifi is available in rooms however coverage is not that great.
We had the best time. All the kids went trick and treating and the park had activities ro celebrate Halloween..we will be back. Thank u

We are from the Gold Coast but wanted a nice and close weekend away. Our worst nightmare happened when our 11yr old son had a diabetic seizure. We cannot thank the staff enough for ensuring the ambulance could get through, being worried about our daughter and looking after her too. They went above and beyond and we really can’t thank them enough. Amazing staff x

Great family caravan park.  The amenities are clean and modern.  Heaps of entertainment for the kids.  We felt the kids were safe enough to be on their own in the park, to scoot or fish at the Billabong.  The park is well maintained with friendly staff.  The kids club activities were a highlight for our children.  We were there during school holidays so it was busy but that wasn’t an issue.  I highly recommend this caravan park.  The only thing to be mindful of is the noise from the airplanes taking off and landing at the nearby Coolangatta airport.

We had a great time. Great facilities and kids activities. Good location for exploring tweed region as well. Quite noisy with the highway and planes but did get somewhat used to it-probably would choose another park in the future for the noise reason but other than noise can’t fault the place. Staff were friendly and great camp kitchen.
Rooms are very average. Great park with great facilities and staff

Staff were fabulous, kind, helpful, calm. Amenities were fabulous! So many to choose from, could stay there all week and not use everything! Cabins were clean, roomy, had everything needed, plenty of plates, cutlery, etc. Beds were comfy, plenty of windows!
Loved on-site coffee/Cafe pop-up and different daily visiting food vans. Large clean laundry facilities.
Definitely book again. Beat van/canin Park ever!
Great for families who want to holiday together but have separate accommodation. Handy to public transport, beaches, shopping centres.
A great place to stay with kids as there is lots to do. The water park is fantastic for kids and adults! I wouldn't book a Cabarita cabin again though.

We recently stayed for a week during the Qld Sept. school holidays. We had some teething problems to begin with, but overall, found the staff to be extremely helpful and willing to resolve any problems. The grounds and amenities are nice, and well maintained. Definitely one of the best camp kitchens I have used. Two pools, only one is heated, and the other a bit too cold at this time of the year. Backs onto the M1, but wasn't bothered by the noise. Under the flight path, but again, you soon got used to it.
Layout of the park is odd, with the waterslides (which are a lot of fun) at one end of the park, and the pools at the other - parents be prepared for a lot of walking :)
kids loved the daily colouring in / activity sheets and had fun at the sprinkles bakehouse

This is my second visit to this lovely holiday park.  It is truly a home away from home where the warm, friendly and efficient staff do their utmost to create a great holiday environment.  The setting is very attractive with parklike tropical grounds,  handy to the motorway, shopping centres and beaches.  The children’s amenities are terrific too and there is a range of delicious food available from the coffee shop and visiting food trucks. All you could wish for in a unique holiday destination!

We stayed at Big 4 Billabong for a long weekend with a group of family and friends for a 40th Birthday. The staff/service was exceptional, we were greeted with a bottle of wine and block of chocolate as a gift for my Husband. The facility's (including pool, water park, billabong, etc) were a hit with all of group, all the kids were constantly entertained. The amenities were lovely and very clean. Everybody in our group commented on what a great park it was and they all would be returning after having such a great weekend!
Great place for the family as long as u can block out the noise of the planes taking off lol

Came here for a little friends birthday like we did last year. Disappointed to hear that they had capped attendee numbers at 20 total and were sending really upset kids away. We paid $15 each to be here regardless of swimming or not. You won't be seeing us for a 3rd year
Under the flight path, I could almost hear the landing gear 🤯

Great facilities. Great staff. Cabins are beautiful and clean.  Unfortunately plenty of Highway noise but they do note this and are up front about it which is nice. Great fun for kids and service is awesome.

Caravan Stay- excellent park for families Two pool areas ( either end of park) jumping castle kids playground a billabong where you can get a paddle board or fish for bream and flathead Grounds neat and tidy and plenty of room for kids to play in Grounds secured by fence and electronic gates Bit of a kiosk ( Basic stuff) at reception There is a coffee kiosk (7am-1pm) great coffee and can get toasties Well catered camp kitchen and lounge area and area for relaxing overseeing the billabong Caravan sites flat some on artificial grass area some with concrete slabs For some caravan sites you needed compass and cut lunch to get to amenities Amenities were clean and up to date There were family friendly ammenities. Availability of Toilets and showers were a problem when it was kids shower time. Lack of rubbish bins was a bit of a problem. Like most caravan parks now catered more for Cabins than caravan sites There we’re signs of more cabins going in. Hopefully don’t push caravans more into back ground. There were permanents and noted some were very abrupt with kids.
Great park well run and great facilities
Such a beautiful park. Rooms and amenities so clean! Staff were so so lovely and the pools, play areas for the kids were so great. We will definitely be back. Thank you

Great park.. Great people.. Great feel..
I love this place. We’ve stayed multiple times now and really wouldn’t look anywhere else around the Tweed area.
The staff here and so helpful and friendly and the facilities are brilliant, from the different food vans that turned up each night to the Camp Kitchen itself which is total LUX.
The cabins here are a really good size, if it’s just the two of you travelling or if you’re travelling with kids and the new ones that are coming look more like full on apartments. There’s plenty of pools and play areas for the kids and is an all ‘round lovely place to stay.
Once you have stayed here.. this will become your standard that you compare everywhere else to.

Here for winter one month to go then head for
Yamba sister Park to Billabong
Too far from anywhere if you don't have transport..plus it's on a flight path and next to a very busy motor way...way too noisy
Overall it’s nice here we did enjoy it. Great for the kids.

We had 5 family’s stay in the  Cabarita cabins and it was absolutely perfect!
With 13 kids between us everyone had the most amazing weekend! We will definitely be back!
Staff + facilities were fantastic!

Wondeful park
Great clean ammenities
Very Friendly staff
Very nice, great family park.
Absolutely Great place to stay

We frequently visit and my kids absolutely love spending time at this park and the sister park Big 4 Saltwater in Yamba. Always clean, friendly staff, fantastic accommodation and ensuite sites with plenty of activities for the whole family from fishing and swimming in the Billabong or having a BBQ at the waterpark. We mix our stays with cabins and camping and always enjoy our stay. Close to shops and easy access from the highway to the park.

From the time we arrived and checked in till we left we were extremely happy with everything about this park. Office staff were awesome offering a different site so we got more sun and there’s plenty of shade for the hotter months. Hats off to everything they organized for the occupants ( adults and kids )of the park to enjoy in the evening. Amenities were spotless and very modern and all the cleaners and ground staff always had a smile on their faces and always said g’day when walking past
Awesome job to all working at the billabong for providing a great place for us to enjoy our holiday
Highly recommended

Great holiday for the family, so much to do with the kids. Take your fishing rods and try to catch some fish with the kids, Waterslides were hit and they also have heated pools. Also take a soccer ball and basketball as they have ball sports courts and a 6 hole mini golf course. Seriously one of the best getaways I've had in a while. Will definitely be returning soon.
